---
title: "Query Garden"
subtitle: "Interactive SQL examples for Quarto HTML documents and revealjs slides"
format: html
filters:
  - query-garden
query-garden:
  databases:
    - name: hr
      sql-file-path: "examples/hr.sql"
    - name: hr-readonly
      sql-file-path: "examples/hr.sql"
      editable: false
---

Query Garden turns ordinary SQL code blocks into browser-run examples backed by
sqlime. The queries below run against the bundled HR sample database.

## Editable SQL

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| dialect: postgresql
select region_id, region_name
from regions;
```

## Dialect Styling

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| dialect: mysql
select employee_id, first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;
```

## Chunk-Registered Database

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr-preview
#| sql-file-path: examples/hr.sql
#| editable: false
#| dialect: sqlite
select department_id, department_name, location_id
from departments
limit 5;
```

## Legacy Class Form

```{.sql .interactive .hr-readonly}
select country_id, country_name, region_id
from countries
limit 5;
```

## More Examples

- [HTML examples](examples/query-garden.qmd)
- [Revealjs slide examples](examples/revealjs.qmd)
- [Python wrapper examples](examples/query-garden-python.qmd)
- [R wrapper examples](examples/query-garden-r.qmd)
